replies.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
replies.body: Hey, I have my own profitable ML-based trading model for BTC (and it also works on Gold). I’ve tested it on about 5 years of data and it averaged roughly around 10% per month with fixed lot. It has a sharpe ratio of >3. I don’t have much capital myself, so I’m looking for genuine people who might be interested in buying it. If you are genuinely interested, feel free to message me — I can share the report.

comments.author: Zestyclose_Volume147
comments.body:
We'd all like a MyFXBook link verified with a reliable broker.

A comparative history with MyFXBook would be helpful, and perhaps access to a read-only demo account would be great too.

The work seems quite good overall; we just want to ensure the reliability of the sources provided.

replies.author: Puzzleheaded_Ad_4478
replies.body: I'm sending you a message for the Myfxbook link. Do you allow me?

replies.author: smartedge-77
replies.body:
Can you please check if this is profitable or still not?

https://www.myfxbook.com/members/Amberkhell/smartedge-pip-moderate/11714106

replies.author: Zestyclose_Volume147
replies.body: The margin used is very high, and the gains versus drawdown ratio isn't very impressive either; an upward trend like this often masks a risky strategy. This is also evident in the Z-score of 99.99, which confirms a martingale, hedge, or other high-risk trading strategy.

replies.author: smartedge-77
replies.body: But the max drawdown in 8 months is 11% which is below the safe standard 20%.average return per month is 10% plus which is ideal. Its live from the past 8/9 months, and the capital more than double, what can be a better EA than this?
